creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
These two tests are failing on i386:

sys.netinet.divert.ipdivert_ip_input_local_success
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-i386-test/9051/testReport/sys.netinet/divert/ipdivert_ip_input_local_success/

sys.netinet.divert.ipdivert_ip_output_remote_success
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-i386-test/9051/testReport/sys.netinet/divert/ipdivert_ip_output_remote_success/

both with message:
ifconfig: interface epair0b does not exist
